name: Sokfest
short_description: Point-and-click your way through an online festival terrain, celebrating the 100th Sokpop game! Befriend the characters from all 100 Sokpop games, and explore a bustling festival with colourful characters!
detailed_description:
Sokfest is an online festival celebrating the 100th Sokpop game!

Get ready to meet all the characters from every Sokpop game up until now! Some will happily become your friend, some require you to help them in some way. It's your goal to be friends with everyone!

Time to get on the bus, sneak onto the festival grounds, and get a second hand ticket - let's party! But, as you unlock new areas of the festival, you'll start to notice something fishy . . . Where is Ruben?! Is the 100th game even finished at all?

Features
  • 🐸 120+ characters to befriend
  • ⛰️ 15+ areas to explore
  • 💬 Funny conversations & puzzles
  • 👆​ Explore in a point-and-click fashion!
  • 🌐 Play online with your friends
  • 😎 Exclusive club with a real DJ set by DJ Diamond
  • 🎶 Performances by DJ Aron and tommie96
  • ⏰ About 1-3 hours of gameplay

This is the 100th Sokpop game! Let's celebrate together!
